name: Walnut Raspberry Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and Crisco over warm water; let it cool slightly.
2. In a separate bowl, blend together the eggs, vanilla extract, sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in the melted chocolate mixture, then fold in the flour.
4. Gently incorporate the chopped walnuts into the batter.
5. Grease an 8-inch square pan thoroughly.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread it evenly.
7. Bake at 325°F for about 40 minutes or until set.
8. Once baked, remove from the oven and carefully spoon the raspberry jam over the warm brownies.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely before serving.
